title: AN ACT TO AMEND SECTIONS THIRTY-EIGHT AND THIRTY-EIGHT-A OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOUR HUNDRED NINE, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACTS NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND TWO HUNDRED ONE AND ONE THOUSAND FIVE HUNDRED SEVENTY-ONE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6475 / 53 OG No. 18, 6032 (September 30, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1860, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND SECTIONS THIRTY-EIGHT AND THIRTY-EIGHT-A OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOUR HUNDRED NINE, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACTS NUMBERED ONE THOUSAND TWO HUNDRED ONE AND ONE THOUSAND FIVE HUNDRED SEVENTY-ONE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section thirty-eight of Republic Act Numbered Four hundred nine, as amended by Republic Acts Numbered One thousand two hundred one and One thousand five hundred seventy-one, is hereby further amended to read as follows:

"SEC. 38.

The City Fiscal and Assistant City Fiscals.

"SEC. 38.

The City Fiscal and Assistant City Fiscals.

âThere shall be in the Office of the City Fiscal one chief to be known as the City Fiscal with the rank of a district judge, three second assistant city fiscals who shall be the chiefs of divisions, and fifty-two assistant fiscals, who shall discharge their duties under the general supervision of the Secretary of Justice. To be eligible for appointment for City fiscal one must be a citizen of the Philippines and must have practiced law in the Philippines for a period of not less than ten years or held during a like period an office in the Philippine Government requiring admission to the practice of law as an indispensable requisite. To be eligible for appointment as assistant fiscal one must be a citizen of the Philippines and must have practiced law for at least five years prior to his appointment or held during a like period an office in the Philippine Government requiring admission to the practice of law as an indispensable requisite.

"The City Fiscal and his assistants shall receive salaries hereinafter set forth, which shall be paid by the City of Manila:

"(

a

) City Fiscal, twelve thousand pesos

per annum

.

"(

"(

a

) City Fiscal, twelve thousand pesos

per annum

.

"(

per annum

.

"(

) Three second assistant city fiscals who shall b the chiefs of the three divisions, eleven thousand pesos

per annum

each.

"(

per annum

each.

"(

each.

"(

"(

per annum

each.

"(

per annum

each.

"(

) Six assistant fiscals, seven thousand two hundred pesos

per annum

, each.

"(

j

) Six assistant fiscals, six thousand six hunded pesos

per annum

each.

"(

k

) Ten assistant fiscals, six thousand pesos

per annum

each."

"The City Fiscal shall effect, from time to time, such changes in the organization of the said three divisions as the exigencies of the service demand. This organization shall be without prejudice to the power of the City fiscal to designate any single assistant fiscal or group of assistant fiscals to investigate and also prosecute the same case or cases:

Provided,

That notwithstanding any provision herein to the contrary, all of the assistant fiscals occupying the positions affected by the amendments embodied in this Act at the time of the approval hereof shall continue to occupy said positions and discharge the duties and functions thereof and receive the corresponding salary increases without the necessity of any new appointment."

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
